purpose: Manual augmentation layer for F3 regional Slack digest and user profile exports, focused on F3-Nation Slack bot administration and IT infrastructure context that is not available through the Slack API/profile export.

slack_workspace_admin.description: Slack workspace-level owner/admin from Slack profile export; controls Slack workspace settings, app installation permissions, workspace-level governance, and similar Slack administration tasks.

f3_nation_region_admin.description: Bot/database org admin role visible/configurable through /f3-nation-settings; grants F3-Nation Slack bot configuration access for the region.
f3_nation_region_admin.source: Manual extraction from /f3-nation-settings because the admin list is not currently available from the provided API/export workflow.

site_q.description: AO-level leadership position, usually assigned through SLT settings or visible in AO/channel context. It does not by itself imply bot admin or Slack admin access.
site_q.source: F3-Nation SLT settings, channel descriptions, messages, leadership data, or manual maintained data when available.

regional_leadership.description: Human regional leadership such as Nantan, Weasel Shaker, 1st F, 2nd F, 3rd F, Comz, etc. Should be sourced separately from maintained leadership data, channel descriptions, message text, or clearly qualified profile/title hints.
regional_leadership.source: Digest leadership data, maintained rosters, channel descriptions, messages, or profile/title hints with confidence labels.

f3_nation_app.pax_visible_use: Regular PAX can use /f3-nation-settings for their own profile and related self-service settings. Admins see additional regional configuration menus.
f3_nation_app.api_availability: Regional F3-Nation admin lists are not currently available from the Slack API or the supplied digest/profile export workflow; this file supplies a manually extracted snapshot.
admin_configuration_scope: Site Q and leadership position assignments

core_integrations_and_setup_owners.purpose: Core data layer for orgs, events, users, positions, and related records.

core_integrations_and_setup_owners.owner_type: Deployment-level dev/ops credentials plus region admin feature toggle
Built in; no key indicated in the provided knowledge base

core_integrations_and_setup_owners.purpose: One-time migration bridge from old Paxminer/slackblast bot.
core_integrations_and_setup_owners.owner_type: F3 Nation dev/ops during migration, then region admin mapping cleanup

normalization_notes: Bunt appeared twice in the supplied list and was de-duplicated.
Preserved lowercase 'schedule 1' from supplied list; do not auto-merge with 'Schedule 1' without confirmation.
Manual appeared twice in the supplied list and was de-duplicated.

missing_details: Manual /f3-nation-settings extraction for Redmond was not included. Do not infer Redmond F3-Nation app admins from Slack admins, Puget Sound admins, leadership titles, or activity patterns.

query_guidance.who_can_fix_or_configure_f3_nation_bot: Use f3_nation_admins for the relevant region first. If the issue concerns deployment credentials, API access, Cloud Run, S3, SendGrid, Slack bot token, or secret/password-gated settings, classify it as likely F3 Nation dev/ops rather than local region admin.
query_guidance.who_controls_slack_workspace: Use Slack workspace owner/admin data from the user profile export, not this augmentation file.
query_guidance.who_runs_an_ao: Use Site Q / SLT / AO channel descriptions / maintained leadership data. Do not infer AO ownership from f3_nation_admins.
why_feature_missing_or_not_working: Check whether the feature is controlled by a regional F3-Nation admin toggle.
Check whether the region is connected/migrated in the bot.
Check whether the destination channel is configured.
Check whether the user has the right role: PAX, F3-Nation app admin, Slack workspace admin, or Site Q.
Check whether the problem is actually Slack workspace permissions or app installation rather than F3-Nation bot settings.
Check whether the problem requires F3 Nation dev/ops because it involves deployment credentials, tokens, API, S3, SendGrid, Cloud Run, or secret admin menu actions.
Acknowledge that Slack exports do not include DMs, private channels, missing channels, or current bot database state unless explicitly provided.
query_guidance.how_to_answer_with_confidence: State whether the answer is confirmed from the manual F3-Nation settings extraction, Slack profile export, digest messages/channel metadata, or inferred from activity. Do not overstate stale/manual/admin-role data as current unless refreshed.

known_limitations: This F3-Nation app admin list was manually extracted on 2026-06-30 and may become stale.
The F3-Nation app admin list is not currently available through the Slack API/profile export workflow used here.
Names are display/F3 names as manually extracted and may not map cleanly to Slack user IDs without additional matching.
Do not merge workspace-local people solely by similar names unless the digest/profile data strongly supports the match.
Visible Slack activity does not prove who handled issues in DMs, private channels, in-person conversations, or channels missing from the export.
Redmond F3-Nation app admin data was not supplied in the manual extraction.
